task-1776096920584-rrtpv0.description: Review recent changes to src/tools/outlookClient.ts. Focus on: 1) Recursive subfolder fetching in listMailFolders (depth 4 max), 2) PascalCase dual-mapping for Outlook REST API fields, 3) Search-all-mail logic (no folder = /messages, browse = /mailfolders/inbox), 4) Network interception token capture with Page.reload fallback, 5) OUTLOOK_API domain choice (outlook.office.com vs outlook.microsoft.com). Check for edge cases, error handling gaps, and correctness.

task-1776096920833-nu0kyq.description: Security audit of authentication and token changes in src/tools/outlookClient.ts and src/auth/tokenExtractor.ts. Focus on: 1) CDP WebSocket token interception — are Bearer tokens exposed or logged? 2) Network interception via fetch() to outlook.microsoft.com/outlook.cloud.microsoft.com — any SSRF risk? 3) Token caching in file cache (authFileCache.ts) — are permissions correct (0o600)? 4) encodeURIComponent on folder IDs — any injection risk? 5) Page.reload approach — can a malicious page inject a fake Bearer token? 6) credentials: 'include' on cross-origin fetch calls — any cookie leakage?

task-1776096922568-7emzme.description: Check test coverage for recent changes in src/tools/outlookClient.ts: 1) Recursive subfolder fetching in listMailFolders — are nested folders tested? 2) PascalCase field mapping — tested for both cases? 3) Search-all-mail (no folder) vs folder-scoped search paths — are both tested? 4) resolveMailFolder partial matching — tested? 5) encodeURIComponent in folder paths — tested? 6) Network interception fallback in acquireOutlookRestToken — tested? Identify gaps and suggest specific test cases.
